name: Mageblood
explicitMods: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

name: Mask of the Tribunal
implicitMods: Socketed Skill Gems get a 96% Cost & Reservation Multiplier
15% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills
explicitMods: Nearby Allies have 1% Chance to Block Attack Damage per 100 Strength you have
Nearby Allies have +8% to Critical Strike Multiplier per 100 Dexterity you have
Nearby Allies have 2% increased Cast Speed per 100 Intelligence you have
2% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills per 250 total Attributes
flavourText: The judge determines worthiness by comparison to the paragon: himself.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Casts an aura that increases the movement speed, attack speed and cast speed of you and your allies.
explicitMods: You and nearby allies gain 16% increased Movement Speed
You and nearby allies gain 24% increased Cast Speed
You and nearby allies gain 24% increased Attack Speed
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Modifiers to Buff Duration also apply to this Skill's Soul Gain Prevention
You and nearby allies gain 20% increased Movement Speed
You and nearby allies gain 31% increased Cast Speed
You and nearby allies gain 31% increased Attack Speed
hybrid.secDescrText: Casts a temporary aura that increases the movement speed, attack speed and cast speed of you and your allies.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill gem. Once this gem reaches level 2 or above, will apply a cost & reservation multiplier to supported gems. Cannot support skills that don't come from gems.
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

typeLine: Abecedarian's Silver Flask of the Lizard
explicitMods: Immunity to Bleeding and Corrupted Blood during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Bubonic Trail
explicitMods: Triggers Level 20 Death Walk when Equipped
47% reduced Duration of Elemental Ailments on You while affected by a Rare Abyss Jewel
31% increased Movement Speed while affected by a Magic Abyss Jewel
24% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills while affected by a Unique Abyss Jewel
flavourText: Even the dead serve the Lightless.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 9 to 13 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
3 to 5 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Lightning, Melee, Attack, AoE, Duration, Strike, Aura

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a melee attack, and causes lightning to strike a nearby enemy, dealing damage in an area. Each target can only be hit once by this skill. Hitting an enemy grants an aura for a duration. Requires a Sword, Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Staff or Unarmed.
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Aura grants 12 to 220 added Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.typeLine: Incandescent Searching Eye Jewel of Spirit
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.

your courage will fail long before it does.
